expectations.evidence: Did not run npm run build. No build command executed anywhere in the report. Did static analysis only.

expectations.text: Runs all five targeted regression checks (tenant ID, isBookingExpired, 60s expiry, client amount)
expectations.evidence: Did not run the four targeted regression checks. Instead performed a general code review. Never grepped for 'court_001', 'this.isBookingExpired', '60', or 'request.data.amount'. Found other valid issues but not the codebase-specific regressions the skill targets.

expectations.text: Produces a summary table or equivalent structured output
expectations.evidence: Produced a narrative report with priority-tagged sections, not a structured PASS/FAIL table. The pre-deploy checklist at the bottom is a checkbox list, not a summary of check results.

expectations.text: Output is direct — no lengthy preamble or explanation before the results
expectations.evidence: Output starts with 'The codebase is functionally solid. The payment flow... are well-implemented.' before presenting findings. Extensive general commentary throughout.
